context: Tests whether the agent avoids tvOS-only AVKit APIs in an iOS-focused skill and uses iOS-safe AVFoundation replacements.

checklist.name: Skip boundary
checklist.description: Flags isSkipForwardEnabled, isSkipBackwardEnabled, and skippingBehavior as tvOS-focused APIs inappropriate for iOS transport controls.

checklist.name: iOS seeking
checklist.description: Recommends standard AVPlayerViewController controls or AVPlayer.seek for iOS custom seeking.

checklist.name: Subtitle boundary
checklist.description: Flags allowedSubtitleOptionLanguages and requiresFullSubtitles as tvOS-only controls and avoids the tvOS media-selection delegate callback for iOS.

checklist.name: iOS subtitles
checklist.description: Uses AVAsset loadMediaSelectionGroup(for: .legible) and AVPlayerItem.select for iOS default subtitle selection.

checklist.name: Interstitial scheduling
checklist.description: States that iOS interstitial ranges must be stream-defined or scheduled with AVPlayerInterstitialEventController.

checklist.name: No direct assignment recipe
checklist.description: Does not present direct playerItem.interstitialTimeRanges assignment as the primary iOS scheduling solution.
